plt\n","import seaborn as sns\n","\n","# Definir las variables independientes (X) y dependientes (y)\n","X = df[['inversion_publicidad']]\n","y = df['ventas']\n","\n","# Crear y entrenar el modelo de regresión lineal\n","model = LinearRegression()\n","model.fit(X, y)\n","\n","# Obtener los coeficientes y el intercepto\n","intercept = model.intercept_\n","coefficient = model.coef_[0]\n","\n","print(f\"Intercepto (b0): {intercept:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"Coeficiente (b1) para inversion_publicidad: {coefficient:.2f}\")\n","\n","# Visualizar la regresión\n","plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n","sns.regplot(x='inversion_publicidad', y='ventas', data=df, scatter_kws={'s': 80, 'alpha': 0.7}, line_kws={'color': 'red'})\n","plt.title('Regresión Lineal: Ventas vs. Inversión en Publicidad')\n","plt.xlabel('Inversión en
